nasb.text: If you are pure and upright, Surely now He would rouse Himself for you And restore your righteous estate.

esv.text: if you are pure and upright, surely then he will rouse himself for you and restore your rightful habitation.

cnv.text: 你若又潔淨又正直， 他就必為你奮起， 復興你公義的居所。

ccb.text: 你若纯洁、正直， 祂必起身相助， 恢复你应有的家园。
